calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for jury trial.
Appearances: David Mendez, Esq. for plaintiff; Selwyn Miller, defendant in pro per.
Court and counsel confer off the record; a settlement agreement is reached. The parties stipulate on the record the terms of settlement; plaintiff's counsel is to prepare a formal settlement agreement for execution by the parties and submittal to the court.
Judge: Mary Wiss; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Diana Chen (D. 504)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF CHARLES M TRACEY
DEFENDANT SELWYN MILLER IN PRO PER

SETTLMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
